name: empty_doc_low_confidence
description: Empty-docs path: no boundary docs attached. Adapter must short-circuit BEFORE issuing a prompt: confidence=0.0, source_ref='evidence:[]', extractor.calls == []. This is the no-evidence intermediate state the UI uses to prompt 'attach a doc first' — accidentally firing an empty prompt would either fail (no inputs) or worse, hallucinate. Stub-only by design: nothing to test against a real LLM since no call should happen.
